items.concept: Babies are born without kneecaps - they have cartilage that doesn't ossify into bone until 3-6 months
items.title: Babies Are Born Without Kneecaps #BabyFacts #Shorts
items.caption: Your baby literally has NO kneecaps. They're born with soft cartilage instead of bone. It doesn't harden into real kneecaps until 3-6 months old. That's why their little legs are so bendy! #BabyFacts #Shorts #NewbornTrivia #BabyScience

items.concept: Newborns can recognize their mother's voice from birth because they heard it in the womb for months
items.title: Your Baby Already Knows Your Voice #BabyFacts #Shorts
items.caption: Your newborn already knows who you are. Babies can recognize their mother's voice from the moment they're born because they've been listening to it for months in the womb. Studies show they even prefer mom's voice over strangers. #BabyFacts #Shorts #NewMom #BabyDevelopment

items.concept: Babies double their birth weight by 5 months - the fastest growth rate of their entire life
items.title: Babies Double Their Weight in 5 Months #BabyFacts #Shorts
items.caption: Imagine doubling YOUR weight in 5 months. That's exactly what your baby does. The first year is the fastest growth period in a human's entire life. If adults grew at the same rate, we'd weigh 300+ pounds by summer. #BabyFacts #Shorts #BabyGrowth #ParentingFacts

items.concept: Newborns have an instinctive swimming reflex - they'll hold their breath and move their arms when submerged
items.title: Newborns Can Swim (Sort Of) #BabyFacts #Shorts
items.caption: Your newborn was born knowing how to swim. Kind of. It's called the dive reflex - when submerged, babies instinctively hold their breath and move their arms and legs. This reflex disappears around 6 months. #BabyFacts #Shorts #BabyScience #NewbornReflex

items.concept: Babies have 10,000 taste buds compared to adults' 5,000 - they cover the roof, sides, and back of the mouth
items.title: Babies Can Taste MORE Than You #BabyFacts #Shorts
items.caption: Your baby can taste more than you can. Babies are born with about 10,000 taste buds, nearly double what adults have. They're everywhere - tongue, roof of mouth, even the back of the throat. No wonder they're so picky! #BabyFacts #Shorts #BabyScience #ParentingTips

items.concept: A newborn's stomach is the size of a marble - it holds just 5-7 mL on day one, growing from cherry to walnut to apricot to egg in the first month
items.title: A Newborn Stomach Is the Size of a MARBLE #BabyFacts #Shorts
items.caption_youtube: A newborn stomach is the size of a MARBLE. Day 1: a cherry (5-7 mL). Day 3: a walnut. Week 1: an apricot. Month 1: an egg. That is why they eat every 2 hours. Tiny tank, huge appetite. #BabyFacts #Shorts #NewbornScience #ParentingTips
items.caption_tiktok: A newborns stomach is the size of a marble. Thats why they eat every 2 hours #BabyFacts #NewbornLife #BabyScience
